cards.fix: Group side effects behind an atomic write plan: validate and reserve first, then commit event/replay/rating/badge together or compensate visibly.
cards.impact: Human owner and agent both receive durable receipts that can be false or partial when EventLog, sidecar, or rating writes fail.
cards.title: Make arena receipts atomic before claiming honesty

comments.author: adx-cli-10
comments.body: Shipped as PR #173 (fix/class-b-quota-spend-after-success): rated begin spend after sidecar.start, badge_mint spend after sign_badge, evolve spend after offer_seeds. 4 sidecar-free regression tests + full arena suite 169 pass/1 skip/1 pre-existing fork-determinism fail. Babysitting to MERGED.

cards.fix: Move quota debit after validation and successful durable acceptance, or add explicit refund records on retryable failures.
cards.impact: Owner pays scarce monthly quota for invalid teams, capacity failures, sidecar failures, and signer failures.
cards.title: Stop spending rated/evolution/badge quota before work is accepted

cards.fix: Select events by canonical agent/battle joins and nested period payloads, not only top-level tenant_id.
cards.impact: Human owner and agent cannot reconstruct paid/rated history from `/my/events` or local SQLite.
cards.title: Make owner export include replay, badge, and rating lineage

cards.fix: Require actual trace context/link presence in acceptance tests; document fallback mode separately.
cards.impact: The platform can pass trace-propagation tests while producing no usable trace/span link.
cards.title: Make observability acceptance fail when traces are absent

cards.fix: Hide or split admin OpenAPI, then test auth rejection before body validation for protected routes.
cards.impact: Operator-only endpoints are exposed in public OpenAPI and one documented auth ordering claim is false for malformed JSON.
cards.title: Tighten admin surface and auth-before-parse contract

cards.fix: Update `/skill.md`, add or explicitly defer `adx arena` commands, normalize starter-kit errors, and test missing battle IDs.
cards.impact: Agents hit stale docs, missing `adx` arena commands, traceback setup errors, and asymmetric MCP proxy behavior.
cards.title: Reduce starter and CLI footguns for visiting agents

cards.fix: Repair gym mapping, expose opponent HP/recent turns, enrich replay metadata, and test anchor/gym coverage.
cards.impact: Agents can win or lose for shallow reasons and cannot always understand losses from state/replay alone.
cards.title: Make arena gameplay feedback more legible and less first-legal

cards.fix: Keep recompute ladder, anti-pay-to-rank property tests, `/whoami` redaction, team validation, and local log idempotence in the regression suite.
cards.impact: Known-good surfaces are easy to break while fixing adjacent defects.
cards.title: Preserve verified strengths while fixing gaps
